title: phyllorkis ciliata
intro: Phyllorkis ciliata, also known as the Liparis crenulata, is a terrestrial orchid species native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phyllorkis ciliata include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Phyllorkis ciliata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
